description:
No spec subject — CI workflow configuration.

scripts/check_specs.sh passes no --base, so CI runs spec.check's default --base HEAD: changed_files=0, append-only guard explicitly skipped (append_only_applicable?(_, "HEAD") -> false), co-update/branch guards no-op. A PR deleting a must requirement or changing behavior without subject co-updates passes CI today. Only head-only checks (validation, verification commands, Overlap) run.

Fix: on pull_request events invoke check_specs.sh --base origin/main (ideally the PR merge base); keep the bare HEAD default for push-to-main and workflow_dispatch. actions/checkout@v4 is depth-1 by default, so add fetch-depth: 0 (or an explicit fetch of main) or the base ref won't exist. Depends on the event-trigger fix ticket (events must fire for the PR path to matter).

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: specled_-dkh-ci-event-triggered-github (interactive implement session)
Log: interactive session, no delegated log file

Commit: 8e30724 on branch specled_-y1c/ci-pr-base (PR #4)
Files touched: .github/workflows/specs.yml
Tests added: none (CI workflow YAML; behavior proven by live CI run, see below)
Verification stubs flipped: none (no spec subject)
Verification tier: change-scoped — mix spec.check --no-run-commands and mix spec.check --base origin/main --no-run-commands locally in worktree (changed_files=1 findings=0); YAML parse check; live proof: PR #4 pull_request run 29968310586 executed 'check_specs.sh --base "origin/${GITHUB_BASE_REF}"' and logged 'branch base=origin/main changed_files=1 findings=0'. Full-system proof deferred to merge gate / PR CI (which is this very run).
Final-tier runs: 1

Summary: On pull_request events specs.yml now invokes check_specs.sh --base origin/$GITHUB_BASE_REF, so spec.check diffs the PR against its merge base (spec.check uses three-dot base...HEAD, satisfying the "ideally the PR merge base" note) and the append-only/co-update/branch guards apply to the PR diff instead of no-oping on --base HEAD. push-to-main and workflow_dispatch keep the bare default per ticket. actions/checkout now uses fetch-depth: 0 so the base ref exists in the runner.

title: specs.yml: PR gate should run spec.check --base origin/main (needs fetch-depth: 0)
